sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109413" key="u(po/tritos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπότρῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109413.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contained</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">times, standing to another number in the ratio</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl>:<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.Cap.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.761</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
